title: Post 3rd Impact Society
wikitext:
[]: Post 3rd Impact Society Post by Sammaeloo » Mon Jul 20, 2009 2:06 pm If almost all of humanity came back from LCL after EoE, and somehow you were in charge, how would rebuild society? If I was happy and wanted to do good, I would try to get things back to being advanced but keeping things as peaceful as possible. I would demolish the petrified MP Evas but the pieces of GNR are definitely too big to get rid of. I would also focus on colonizing space. If I wanted to be an evil greedy overlord I would have people carve monuments out of the petrified GNR pieces and keep all the advanced technology for myself.

[]: Post by Evangelionfreak » Mon Jul 20, 2009 2:07 pm I would be queen and Kaworu would be my King

[]: Post by Axell » Mon Jul 20, 2009 3:05 pm kaworu would probably leave you for Shinji though

[]: Post by IrkenEvangelion » Mon Jul 20, 2009 3:07 pm I would run off with people I trust and set up my own city/country run by me and my fellow ruler. It'd be a dictatorship but there'd be two people ruling to keep each other in check. Yes we would be one of the dominate nations once everything picked back up. EDIT: I'd also have one of the MP Evas moved to my city and have it be right in the center, just because that's cool.

[]: Post by schismatics » Mon Jul 20, 2009 3:12 pm I'd call dibs on a mountain and pull a SurvivorMan on everyone. OH SNAP.

[]: Post by scarmullet » Mon Jul 20, 2009 4:26 pm One thing is for certain, the company that makes Tang, would not be coming back.

[]: Post by Vegeta 20XX » Mon Jul 20, 2009 4:42 pm IrkenEvangelion wrote: I would run off with people I trust and set up my own city/country run by me and my fellow ruler. It'd be a dictatorship but there'd be two people ruling to keep each other in check. Yes we would be one of the dominate nations once everything picked back up. EDIT: I'd also have one of the MP Evas moved to my city and have it be right in the center, just because that's cool.

[]: Post by Defectron » Mon Jul 20, 2009 4:53 pm Well my ideal country would be something similar to what Lord Genome ruled over in Gurren lagann. Yes I would rule the world with beastmen and giant robots, I'de also like to reverse engineer an army of angels to use at my disposal. Though I have no idea why anyone else would go along with that crazy idea.

[]: Post by IrkenEvangelion » Mon Jul 20, 2009 5:00 pm Vegeta 20XX, that seat's already taken by my cousin, sorry. You can have a seat on the counsel though.

[]: Post by Vegeta 20XX » Mon Jul 20, 2009 5:01 pm Then it seems that I have some competition worthier than Irken... *pushes Irken to the side* Are we assuming that some of the already mentioned nations are formed at about the same time as yours? Because then we have a scenario that many involve warfare (with my machines and supersoldiers and your beastmen and giant robots)! Also, what would you do with the angels that are more Eva-combat specific (several of the Angels' attacks are only effective against the Evangelions, in particular Arael, Armisael, and Gay Boy). I may have to make good on my bluffs after all...

[]: Post by Defectron » Mon Jul 20, 2009 5:34 pm Arael, Armisael, and Gay Boy

[]: Post by Vegeta 20XX » Mon Jul 20, 2009 5:46 pm Your point is only valid on Kaworu. Armisael merging with one or two people would be a waste of resources and potential, and Arael is ineffective against those with relatively clean pasts.

[]: Post by Defectron » Mon Jul 20, 2009 5:48 pm Armisael merging with one or two people would be a waste of resources and potential, and Arael is ineffective against those with relatively clean pasts.

[]: Post by Joseph the PRPD » Mon Jul 20, 2009 9:52 pm Evangelionfreak wrote: I would be queen and Kaworu would be my King

[]: Post by Evangelionfreak » Mon Jul 20, 2009 11:12 pm Axell wrote: kaworu would probably leave you for Shinji though

[]: Post by Synapsid » Mon Jul 20, 2009 11:50 pm Evangelionfreak wrote: Axell wrote: kaworu would probably leave you for Shinji though

[]: Post by Evangelionfreak » Tue Jul 21, 2009 1:43 am Synapsid wrote: Evangelionfreak wrote: Axell wrote: kaworu would probably leave you for Shinji though

[]: Post by Kaworu_Tabris » Tue Jul 21, 2009 2:56 am jajaaja thats insane!

[]: Post by Vegeta 20XX » Tue Jul 21, 2009 4:31 am IrkenEvangelion wrote: Vegeta 20XX, that seat's already taken by my cousin, sorry. You can have a seat on the counsel though.

[]: Post by IrkenEvangelion » Tue Jul 21, 2009 12:06 pm Sounds good. Asuka will be our Queen. Sounds like exactly what she would want.
